name: Lite Peanut Butter Puffs
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Spray cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients at low speed until well blended, about 2 minutes. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto the prepared cookie sheet. Bake for 8-10 minutes in the preheated oven until edges just begin to brown and cookies are set.
Nutritional Information: Calories: 80; protein 1g; carbohydrates 11g; fat 3g; cholesterol 15mg; sodium 100mg; potassium 30mg.
